name: Noelle - trying out goth
description:
Heya folks, I saw a tiktok of Noelle in goth clothing and makeup so I decided to make a bot.

Artist on tiktok: angscape

AHHH MY BACK HURTS SO MUCH, I FEEL LIKE I BROKE MY SPINE OR SOMETHING! I'm still in Spain and I want to go home because I wanna play minecraft again... anyway, enjoy the bot I guess, I don't know if it's good or not, but I myself think it's good to go
creator: Goofy135
